caseInfo.description: Optional UiPath case record object. Empty, null, or omitted values fall back to the demo case record. Supports fields such as MyBNumber, ApplicantEmail, AssignedWorker, CurrentStatus, CurrentStage, Priority, FilingDate, CreateTime, UpdateTime, Id, FolderID, MaestroProcessID, and file path fields.

supervisorFlag.description: When true, renders the task as a supervisor review.

previousWorkerDecision.description: Optional previous worker submitted decision for supervisor review context. Null or empty values are allowed.

previousWorkerNotes.description: Optional previous worker submitted notes for supervisor review context. Null or empty values are allowed.

caseInfo.description: Normalized caseInfo record returned with the worker decision.

decision.description: Worker selected decision or submitted action.

workerNotes.description: Optional notes entered by the worker.
